basic-ls.prompt: List all files within the current working directory.
hints: There's a single command you can use to list files in a directory.
The single command does not require any additional flags or arguments.
'ls' (for "list") can list all files in a directory.
Type 'ls' (and nothing more) to list all files in the current directory.

remove-dir-contents.prompt: Remove the contents of 'directory-a', but not the folder itself.
